briefdescription.para: Converts a memory address to a VRAM address accessible by the GPU.

detaileddescription.para: The first pgraph 0x3D subchannel that can be used by tests. It appears that this must be exactly one more than the last subchannel configured by pbkit or else it will trigger an exception in xemu.

briefdescription.para: The first pgraph context channel that can be used by tests.
